controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹1,00,000 and thereafter, in multiples of ₹50,000
controls.control_description:
1.1 Reporting of Currency Chest Transactions
The minimum amount of deposit into / withdrawal from currency chest shall be ₹1,00,000 and thereafter, in multiples of ₹50,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹1,00,000 and thereafter, in multiples of ₹50,000

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably report all transactions through cym - cc portal on the same day by 7 pm
controls.control_description: 1.2.1 The currency chests shall invariably report all transactions through CyM - CC portal on the same day by 7 pm.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to invariably report all transactions through cym - cc portal on the same day by 7 pm

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered on case-to-case basis
controls.control_description:
Withdrawn
Relaxation in the reporting period on account of strike situation shall be considered on case-to-case basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered on case-to-case basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on the amount due from the chest holding bank for the period of delay
controls.control_description:
2.1.1 Delay in Reporting
In the event of delay in reporting currency chest transactions, penal interest at the rate indicated in paragraph 4 of this circular shall be levied on the amount due from the chest holding bank for the period of delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied on the amount due from the chest holding bank for the period of delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on t+0 basis i
controls.control_description: Penal interest shall be calculated on T+0 basis i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on t+0 basis i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in respect of transactions not reported by currency chests to the issue office on the same business day within the time limit prescribed abo
controls.control_description: penal interest shall be levied in respect of transactions not reported by currency chests to the Issue Office on the same business day within the time limit prescribed above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be levied in respect of transactions not reported by currency chests to the issue office on the same business day within the time limit prescribed abo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in respect of cases of wrong reporting in the same manner till the date of receipt of corrected advice by reserve bank
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 Wrong Reporting
Penal interest shall be levied in respect of cases of wrong reporting in the same manner till the date of receipt of corrected advice by Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in respect of cases of wrong reporting in the same manner till the date of receipt of corrected advice by reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably be levied in all cases of wrong reporting by the currency chests
controls.control_description: As debits/credits to banks' current accounts are raised on the basis of the transactions reported by the currency chests, penal interest shall invariably be levied in all cases of wrong reporting by the currency chests.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably be levied in all cases of wrong reporting by the currency chests

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh/re-issuable notes sent to the currency chests from rbi/note printing presses are not reported as 'deposit
controls.control_description: Particular care shall be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh/re-issuable notes sent to the currency chests from RBI/Note printing presses are not reported as 'deposit' transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh/re-issuable notes sent to the currency chests from rbi/note printing presses are not reported as 'deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with reserve bank on account of wrong reporting / delayed
controls.control_description: (i) Penal interest shall be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank on account of wrong reporting / delayed reporting of transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with reserve bank on account of wrong reporting / delayed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest at the rate specified in paragraph 4
controls.control_description: If such amounts are included in the chest balances, these shall be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest at the rate specified in paragraph 4.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest at the rate specified in paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances
controls.control_description: (iii) In all the above cases (excepting shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances / remittances), penal interest shall be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken on the basis of prevailing "scheme of penalties"
controls.control_description:
2.1.4 Penal measures for other deficiencies
Penal measures for shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances / remittances shall be taken on the basis of prevailing "Scheme of Penalties".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken on the basis of prevailing "scheme of penalties"

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as withdrawal by chest(s)
controls.control_description:
3.1 Reporting of soiled note remittances to RBI
Soiled note remittances to RBI shall not be shown as withdrawal by chest(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as withdrawal by chest(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied irrespective of the value of remittance and period of such wrong reporting
controls.control_description: In case such remittances to RBI are wrongly reported as 'withdrawals', a penalty of ₹50,000 shall be levied irrespective of the value of remittance and period of such wrong reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied irrespective of the value of remittance and period of such wrong reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate the entry
controls.control_description: The CC sending the diversion should initiate the entry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate the entry

controls.control_objective: To ensure acknowledge the same
controls.control_description: The receiving CC should acknowledge the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to acknowledge the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported as deposit/withdrawal
controls.control_description: Diversions should not be reported as deposit/withdrawal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported as deposit/withdrawal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for any such wrong reporting
controls.control_description: A penalty of ₹50,000 shall be levied for any such wrong reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied for any such wrong reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged
controls.control_description:
3.3 Delayed reporting where currency chests had "Net Deposit"
Penal interest at the prevailing rate for delayed reporting of the instances where the currency chest had reported "net deposit" shall not be charged.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on the currency chests for delayed reporting, irrespective of the value of net deposit
controls.control_description: However, in order to ensure proper discipline in reporting currency chest transactions, a flat penalty of ₹50,000 shall be levied on the currency chests for delayed reporting, irrespective of the value of net deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied on the currency chests for delayed reporting, irrespective of the value of net deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing bank rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest
controls.control_description:
Rate of penal interest
Penal interest shall be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest balances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing bank rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restored to the original cc
controls.control_description: On completion of the transactions the user rights shall be restored to the original CC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restored to the original cc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the officer-in- charge of the issue department of the regional office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting currency chest is located
controls.control_description:
6.1 Competent Authority
The Competent Authority to decide on the nature of irregularity shall be the Officer-in- Charge of the Issue Department of the Regional Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting currency chest is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the officer-in- charge of the issue department of the regional office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting currency chest is located

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision
controls.control_description: 6.2.1 Given the business continuity capability provided by the CyM (see paragraph 5 Above), there should ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the regional director/chief general manager/officer-in-charge of the regional office concerned through the head / controlling office of the
controls.control_description: However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced by currency chests especially in hilly/remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc., may be made to the Regional Director/Chief General Manager/Officer-in-Charge of the Regional Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the bank within a month from the date of debit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the regional director/chief general manager/officer-in-charge of the regional office concerned through the head / controlling office of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered, only if the application for the same is made in the cc portal within the prescribed timelines
controls.control_description: 6.2.2 Any penalty/penal interest waiver request shall be considered, only if the application for the same is made in the CC portal within the prescribed timelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered, only if the application for the same is made in the cc portal within the prescribed timelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description: Waiver request in any other mode shall not be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description: 6.2.3 In the case of wrong reporting representations for waiver shall not be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest
controls.control_description: 6.2.4 As the intention behind the levy of penal interest/ penalty is to inculcate discipline among banks so as to ensure prompt/correct reporting, requests by banks for waiver of penal interest on grounds that delayed/wrong reporting did not result in utilization of the Reserve Bank's funds or shortfall in the maintenance of CRR/SLR or that they were the result of clerical mistakes, unintentional or arithmetical errors, first time error, inexperience of staff, expiry of digital certificate etc., shall not be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest
